de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model

Interface ISymbolicEquivalenceClass

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ISymbolicElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SymbolicEquivalenceClass, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessEquivalenceClass

    public interface ISymbolicEquivalenceClass
extends ISymbolicElement
    An equivalence class which defines which Terms represent the same ISymbolicObject in an ISymbolicLayout.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean containsTerm(Term term)
      Checks if a Term is contained.
      Term getRepresentative()
      Returns the most representative term.
      String getRepresentativeString()
      Returns the most representative term as human readable String.
      ImmutableList<Term> getTerms()
      Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject.
      ImmutableList<String> getTermStrings()
      Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject as human readable String.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.ISymbolicElement

        getSettings

    • Method Detail

      • getTerms

        ImmutableList<Term> getTerms()
        Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject.

      • containsTerm

        boolean containsTerm(Term term)
        Checks if a Term is contained.
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        true Term is contained, false Term is not contained.
